artifact.title: brainstorm common Work Brief fixture

ownership.concurrencyNotes: I-05A common writer fixture; producer-specific skill behavior is out of scope.

artifact.background: A domain-neutral harness workflow needs a durable typed intake artifact.
artifact.problemOrOpportunity: Planning must consume validated Work Brief JSON instead of raw chat.
artifact.desiredOutcome: The shared common writer emits a canonical Work Brief accepted by the artifacts validator.
constraints: Preserve typed JSON artifact boundaries
Avoid producer-specific behavior in the common writer
userVisibleBehavior: Agents can pass the same Work Brief class between skills
nonGoals: Do not implement plan intake
Do not implement producer-specific skill prompts
risksAndUnknowns: Package dependency wiring must remain explicit
